name: Splint Set
shortDescription: Wooden splint set with bandages in a carry pouch, for on-site fracture immobilisation.
longDescription: A set of wooden splints in graduated sizes with accompanying bandages, packed in a red carry pouch for quick access. Used to immobilise a suspected fracture before the casualty can reach medical care — a standard addition alongside our larger workplace and industrial first aid kits.

images.alt: Splint Set supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
